name: ai-daily-digest
author: vigorX777

metadata.name: ai-daily-digest
metadata.description: AI-curated daily tech digest from 90 top Hacker News blogs with bilingual support
metadata.author: vigorX777

features: 90 curated tech blog sources from Andrej Karpathy's HN recommendations
AI-powered multi-dimensional article scoring (AI/ML, Security, Engineering, Tools, Opinion, Other)
Bilingual output support (Chinese and English via --lang flag)
Smart filtering with configurable article count and time range
Visual statistics with Mermaid charts and ASCII visualizations
Zero dependency single TypeScript file using Bun runtime
Dual AI provider support (Gemini primary, OpenAI fallback)
Markdown digest format with Top 3 previews and trend analysis
Concurrent RSS fetching from all 90 sources
notes: ⚠️ VERY YOUNG REPOSITORY - Created Feb 14, 2026 (3 weeks old)
⚠️ NO LICENSE FILE - Legal status unclear, use at own risk
⭐ 1,400 GitHub stars - Good community interest despite young age
💰 API COSTS - Heavy usage: ~90 RSS feeds + AI scoring per run
🔧 Requires Bun runtime installation (not standard Node.js)
🌐 Bilingual capable - Use --lang en for English, --lang zh for Chinese
📚 Quality sources - Uses Andrej Karpathy's curated HN blog list
📝 Chinese documentation - README and SKILL.md entirely in Chinese
💾 Smart defaults - 48 hours lookback, 15 articles, saves preferences
⚠️ Use with caution - Very new, no license, unclear long-term support
Best for: Daily tech news consumers comfortable with Bun and API costs
NOT for: Production use, license-sensitive environments, budget users
